claims.text: Our copper cathodes are produced by a pyrometallurgical process, electrolytically refined, at Boliden Rönnskär, Sweden, and at Boliden Harja valta, Finland.
claims.snippet: Our copper cathodes are produced by a pyrometallurgical process, electrolytically refined, at Boliden Rönnskär, Sweden, and at Boliden Harja valta, Finland.

claims.text: Our annual cathode production exceeds 330,000 mt, making us the third biggest refined copper producer in Europe.
claims.snippet: Our annual cathode production exceeds 330,000 mt, making us the third biggest refined copper producer in Europe.

claims.text: Our copper cathodes meet the London Metal Exchange (LME) quality requirements for Grade A copper cathode with 99,995% Cu purity or higher.
claims.snippet: Our copper cathodes meet the London Metal Exchange (LME) quality requirements for Grade A copper cathode with 99,995% Cu purity or higher.

claims.text: With a level of total impurities of less than 0,005% it is the purest copper according to EN 1978-Cu-CATH-1 standard.
claims.snippet: With a level of total impurities of less than 0,005% it is the purest copper according to EN 1978-Cu-CATH-1 standard.

claims.text: Our brands, BK and BCH are registered brands in the LME.
claims.snippet: Our brands, BK and BCH are registered brands in the LME.

claims.text: They suit all applications and can be mixed with alloying elements and are available from 40 kg to 100 kg in weight.
claims.snippet: They suit all applications and can be mixed with alloying elements and are available from 40 kg to 100 kg in weight.

claims.text: Boliden as the North European producer of Grade A copper cathode, through its geographic location, high quality products and professional service, provides you with frequent, agile and precise deliveries supporting your high quality product portfolio and efficient working capital management targets.
claims.snippet: Boliden as the North European producer of Grade A copper cathode, through its geographic location, high quality products and professional service, provides you with frequent, agile and precise deliveries supporting your high quality product portfolio and efficient working capital management targets.

claims.text: As a European Union producer Boliden fulfills the prerequisites of the foreign trade preferential status of several other European, Pan-Euro Mediterranean, American and Asian countries.
claims.snippet: As a European Union producer Boliden fulfills the prerequisites of the foreign trade preferential status of several other European, Pan-Euro Mediterranean, American and Asian countries.

claims.text: 2% of a passenger airplane's weight consists of copper - 190 km cabling
claims.snippet: 2% of a passenger airplane's weight consists of copper - 190 km cabling

claims.text: The annual turnover is approximately SEK 50 billion.
claims.snippet: The annual turnover is approximately SEK 50 billion.
